LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF STAN MUSILEK'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ORDER DISMISSING COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE OF EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. HE MAY FILE HIS AMENDED COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF MUST REIMBURSE DEFENDANT FOR THE COSTS AND FEES INCURRED IN OBTAINING THE DISMISSAL, FOR WHICH DEFENDANT MAY BRING A SEPARATE MOTION IF THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE AS TO THE AMOUNT.
